since_last: 28% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +0.62%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 28% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC +1.26% · Gold -0.01% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 28% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +0.62%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +0.62%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.68%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DV is the standout at +5.52%
cards.body: Leaders: DV +5.52%, INTC +3.96%, SMCI +3.91%, MU +3.26%, VRT +1.93%. Laggards: SPCX -3.89%, CHKP -3.85%, SAP -3.34%, ARM -2.33%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.89% at $177.8
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.89% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
